basic_details.job_title: Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 59 Lower Division Typist, Office Attendant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Lower Division Typist, Office Attendant and More
basic_details.short_information: The Kerala Public Service Commission (Kerala PSC) has officially announced the Lower Division Typist, Office Attendant, and More Posts Recruitment 2026 with 59 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official Kerala PSC website https://www.keralapsc.gov.in/. Candidates aged between 18 and 45 years and holding educational qualifications ranging from 10th pass to post-graduate degrees, including B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, M.A, M.Com, M.Sc, MSW, or equivalent, are eligible to submit their online applications through the KPSC One Time Registration system. important_dates.written/omr/online examination date: To be notified on KPSC website

application_fee.details: No application fee is required for this post. Candidates can apply free of cost through the official KPSC One Time Registration portal at www.keralapsc.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, 10TH, M.A, M.Com, M.Sc, MSW
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application. In addition to the prescribed qualifications, candidates must meet the physical standards specified below and submit a Medical Certificate in the prescribed format from a Medical Officer not below the rank of Assistant Surgeon. | The educational qualification and its equivalent as recognized by executive orders or standing orders of the Government shall also be accepted. Candidates must produce the copy of relevant Government orders on equivalency as and when required by the Commission.

selection_process: The selection process will be conducted as per the rules and regulations of Travancore Titanium Products Ltd. If a Written / OMR / Online Test is conducted as part of the selection

only candidates possessing the requisite qualifications will be allowed to appear. Candidates will be advised from the Ranked List prepared in the order of merit. The Ranked List will remain in force for a minimum period of one year and a maximum period of three years. Kerala PSC reserves the right to cancel the advice for appointment of any candidate if any mistake is found later. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and medical fitness.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official website of the Kerala Public Service Commission at www.keralapsc.gov.in via the One Time Registration (OTR) system. Applications submitted in any other manner will be summarily rejected. New users must first complete One Time Registration on the KPSC website before applying. Candidates who have already registered can apply by logging into their profile using their User-ID and Password and clicking on the 'Apply Now' button of the respective post in the Notification Link.

Candidates must apply for the post in only one district and note the name of that district in the relevant column of the online application. Applying for more than one district in response to this notification is strictly prohibited - if found, the applications will be rejected and disciplinary action will be initiated. No application fee is required. Candidates are responsible for the correctness of personal information and secrecy of password. After final submission, no changes or deletions are permitted. Candidates are advised to keep a printout or soft copy of the online application for future reference.

If a Written/OMR/Online Test is conducted, candidates must submit a confirmation for writing the examination through their One Time Registration profile within the stipulated period - failing which the application will be rejected absolutely. Candidates who have AADHAAR card must add it as Identity Proof in their profile. Original documents to prove qualification, age, community etc. have to be produced as and when called for by the Commission.
Documents to be Produced When Called for (Original):
Age proof - SSLC Book or equivalent certificate
Government approved 2-year National/State Trade Certificate in Electrician/Wireman
Medical Certificate in prescribed format (from a Medical Officer not below the rank of Assistant Surgeon) to prove physical fitness and vision
Gazette notification in case of difference in caste/community between application and SSLC book (along with Non-Creamy Layer/Community Certificate)
AADHAAR Card (for candidates who possess one)
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted online only through the KPSC One Time Registration portal - applications in any other manner will be summarily rejected. Candidates must apply for only one district; applying for more than one district will lead to rejection of all applications and disciplinary action. Candidates appointed in Idukki, Wayanad, or Kasargod districts will not be eligible for working arrangement, deputation, transfer, or mutual transfer for at least ten years, and promotion will also be limited to those districts. No application fee is required for this post. Candidates already in Government service holding the same post in any district are prohibited from applying again for this post. 4% of vacancies are reserved for Differently Abled candidates as per the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016. Candidates must submit confirmation for the examination through their OTR profile within the stipulated period - failure to do so will result in absolute rejection of the application. Admission Tickets will be available for download only to candidates who have submitted confirmation, 15 days prior to the examination date. Candidates with AADHAAR card must add it as Identity Proof in their profile. Profile corrections made after the last date of application will not be reflected in the application - such corrections take effect only from the date on which they are made. Candidates must ensure that the photograph uploaded in the profile has the candidate's name and date of photograph printed legibly at the bottom portion; photograph is valid for 10 years from the date of taking. Disciplinary action as per Rule 22 of Kerala Public Service Commission Rules of Procedure 1976 shall be initiated against candidates who submit applications with bogus claims of qualifications or other details. Candidates are advised to visit www.keralapsc.gov.in regularly for updates on all stages of the recruitment process.

content_sections.heading: Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: The Kerala Public Service Commission has officially released Category No. 23/2026 TO 38/2026 for recruitment to 59 Lower Division Typist, Office Attendant and More Posts posts. The notification includes complete details on district-wise vacancies, eligibility, physical standards, medical certificate format, age limit, selection process, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification and its annexures before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the official Kerala PSC website. Download KPSC Electricity Worker Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application. In addition to the prescribed qualifications, candidates must meet the physical standards specified below and submit a Medical Certificate in the prescribed format from a Medical Officer not below the rank of Assistant Surgeon. The educational qualification and its equivalent as recognized by executive orders or standing orders of the Government shall also be accepted. Candidates must produce the copy of relevant Government orders on equivalency as and when required by the Commission.

rows.qualification: B.Sc. in Dairy Science or B.Tech. (Dairy Science and Technology) from a recognised University
Masters Degree in Home Science or Social work or Sociology or Psychology of a recognised University.
Pass in SSLC or its equivalent.

rows.post_name: Scheduled Castes Development Officer Grade - II
rows.qualification: Must possess M.A./M.Sc./M.Com or MSW Degree of a recognised University.
Plus two (Science) or its equivalent qualification., Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Cardio Vascular Technology course from an NMC recognized University

rows.post_name: Police Constable Driver/ Woman Police Constable Driver
rows.qualification: Pass in Higher Secondary Education Examination (Plus Two) or its equivalent.
Pass in Plus 2 or equivalent qualification, Lower Grade Certificate in Type writing English (KGTE) & Computer Word Processing or its equivalent.
Pass in Plus 2 or its equivalent.
Pass in SSLC or its equivalent qualification, ITI in the trade of Blacksmith or its equivalent qualification
Degree in Modern Medicine (MBBS) or Equivalent Qualification, Must possess valid Registration with Travancore Cochin Medical Council.
A pass in S.S.L.C or its equivalent examination.

rows.post_name: Junior Health Inspector Gr.II (SR from ST only)
rows.qualification: Pass in Plus 2 with Science subjects or its equivalent examination from recognized institutions. Diploma in Health Inspector course conducted by Director of Health Services or by any other institution

rows.post_name: Lower Division Typist (Special Recruitment for ST Only)
rows.qualification: A pass in SSLC or its equivalent.
A Degree in any subject from a recognized University, Must be an Ex-serviceman who had retired from the rank of Captain or from a similar cadre in Navy or Air Force.

content_sections.heading: KPSC Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is required for this post. Candidates can apply free of cost through the official KPSC One Time Registration portal at www.keralapsc.gov.in.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process will be conducted as per the rules and regulations of Travancore Titanium Products Ltd. If a Written / OMR / Online Test is conducted as part of the selection, only candidates possessing the requisite qualifications will be allowed to appear. Candidates will be advised from the Ranked List prepared in the order of merit. The Ranked List will remain in force for a minimum period of one year and a maximum period of three years . Kerala PSC reserves the right to cancel the advice for appointment of any candidate if any mistake is found later. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and medical fitness.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Kerala PSC Electricity Worker Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online only through the official website of the Kerala Public Service Commission at www.keralapsc.gov.in via the One Time Registration (OTR) system. Applications submitted in any other manner will be summarily rejected. New users must first complete One Time Registration on the KPSC website before applying. Candidates who have already registered can apply by logging into their profile using their User-ID and Password and clicking on the 'Apply Now' button of the respective post in the Notification Link. Candidates must apply for the post in only one district and note the name of that district in the relevant column of the online application. Applying for more than one district in response to this notification is strictly prohibited - if found, the applications will be rejected and disciplinary action will be initiated. No application fee is required. Candidates are responsible for the correctness of personal information and secrecy of password. After final submission, no changes or deletions are permitted. Candidates are advised to keep a printout or soft copy of the online application for future reference. If a Written/OMR/Online Test is conducted, candidates must submit a confirmation for writing the examination through their One Time Registration profile within the stipulated period - failing which the application will be rejected absolutely. Candidates who have AADHAAR card must add it as Identity Proof in their profile. Original documents to prove qualification, age, community etc. have to be produced as and when called for by the Commission. Documents to be Produced When Called for (Original): Age proof - SSLC Book or equivalent certificate SSLC Certificate/Marksheet and Pass Certificate Government approved 2-year National/State Trade Certificate in Electrician/Wireman Community/Caste Certificate (SC/ST/OBC) if applicable Medical Certificate in prescribed format (from a Medical Officer not below the rank of Assistant Surgeon) to prove physical fitness and vision Gazette notification in case of difference in caste/community between application and SSLC book (along with Non-Creamy Layer/Community Certificate) AADHAAR Card (for candidates who possess one) Printout of online application Apply Online at: https://www.keralapsc.gov.in

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Kerala PSC Electricity Worker Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online only through the KPSC One Time Registration portal - applications in any other manner will be summarily rejected. Candidates must apply for only one district; applying for more than one district will lead to rejection of all applications and disciplinary action. Candidates appointed in Idukki, Wayanad, or Kasargod districts will not be eligible for working arrangement, deputation, transfer, or mutual transfer for at least ten years, and promotion will also be limited to those districts. No application fee is required for this post. Candidates already in Government service holding the same post in any district are prohibited from applying again for this post. 4% of vacancies are reserved for Differently Abled candidates as per the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016. Candidates must submit confirmation for the examination through their OTR profile within the stipulated period - failure to do so will result in absolute rejection of the application. Admission Tickets will be available for download only to candidates who have submitted confirmation, 15 days prior to the examination date. Candidates with AADHAAR card must add it as Identity Proof in their profile. Profile corrections made after the last date of application will not be reflected in the application - such corrections take effect only from the date on which they are made. Candidates must ensure that the photograph uploaded in the profile has the candidate's name and date of photograph printed legibly at the bottom portion; photograph is valid for 10 years from the date of taking. Disciplinary action as per Rule 22 of Kerala Public Service Commission Rules of Procedure 1976 shall be initiated against candidates who submit applications with bogus claims of qualifications or other details. Candidates are advised to visit www.keralapsc.gov.in regularly for updates on all stages of the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process closes on 01 July 2026. Candidates must submit their applications before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are available under Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 59 posts are available, including positions like Lower Division Typist, Office Attendant, Assistant Manager, and others.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post, generally ranging from 18 to 45 years, with category-wise relaxations as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What educational qualifications are required?
faq.answer: Qualifications depend on the post. Candidates must have Bachelors Degree, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, 10th, M.A, M.Com, M.Sc, or MSW, depending on the position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. All candidates can apply free of cost through the official KPSC One Time Registration portal.

faq.question: Q6. How will the selection be conducted for Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection may involve written/OMR/online examinations, followed by a merit-based ranked list. Final selection is subject to document verification and medical fitness.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates apply for more than one district?
faq.answer: No. Candidates must apply for only one district. Applications for multiple districts will be rejected, and disciplinary action may be taken.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required at the time of verification?
faq.answer: Candidates must produce age proof, educational certificates, caste/community certificate (if applicable), medical certificate, Aadhaar card, and printout of online application.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any reservations under Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Reservation applies as per SC/ST/OBC/Differently Abled candidates norms. For example, 4% of vacancies are reserved for Differently Abled candidates.

faq.question: Q10. How can candidates apply for Kerala PSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only via the official website: www.keralapsc.gov.in through the One Time Registration (OTR) system.
